signal.description: Agents keep overwriting agentxchain.json during turns, stripping operator-added sections (timeouts, watch routes). Add Do NOT modify agentxchain.json instruction to all 4 role prompts under write boundaries section. File is operator-owned config.

evidence.value: Confirmed across 3+ runs: PM agent overwrites agentxchain.json stripping timeouts and beta_bug_report watch route. Requires manual restoration each monitoring cycle.
